column1: Even if you only have a ___________money, you can still have a great time at your local open-air market.
Often, the food in your local supermarket_____________travelled a long way, but at the market you know that you're buying food which has been produced locally.
The vegetables_____________fresh, even if you go late in the day when there are only a___________left.
Support your local market and help local farmers. Contact your Town Hall to find out if there are___________open-air markets in your area.
